creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to sven.a.jonsson from comment #6)

That's what documentations says. I've always had it. However there is a circular dep with ccache4 and asciidoctor/ruby/cmake/etc. So sometimes I have to comment it, run poudriere bulk devel/ccache4 (without cache), and then enable it again.

I hope ccache4 will not be a compile time dependency anymore and will get some special handling (e.g. it could be built and install separately before building tree for other ports), however even simpler changes are quite hard to push.
